api.clientId.label: Plaid Client ID
api.clientId.help: Plaid API client id. Falls back to PLAID_CLIENT_ID.

api.secret.label: Plaid Secret
api.secret.help: Plaid API secret. Falls back to PLAID_SECRET.

api.environment.label: Plaid Environment
api.environment.help: Plaid environment: sandbox, development, or production.

api.countryCodes.label: Plaid Country Codes
api.countryCodes.help: Country codes for Plaid Link item creation.

api.daysRequested.label: Plaid Transaction History Days
api.daysRequested.help: Number of historical days requested when creating a new link token.
